description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test, deploy, and docs, using python:3.6 for most jobs and continuumio/miniconda:latest for the Anaconda deployment job. In the test stage add a test job that runs python setup.py test --addopts=\"--cov=fizzbuzz\". In the deploy stage add a deploy_anaconda job that runs conda create -n py36 python=3.6 conda-build anaconda-client -y, source activate py36, and conda build --user $ANACONDA_USERNAME --token $ANACONDA_TOKEN .conda, and a deploy_pypi job that runs pip install -U twine setuptools, python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, and twine upload dist/*, both triggered only on tags matching /^^v\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+([abc]\\d*)?$$/. In the docs stage add a pages job that runs pip install sphinx sphinx_rtd_theme, pip install -e ., mkdir public, cd docs, make apidocs, make html, and cp -r _build/html/* ../public, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Define variables TWINE_PASSWORD, TWINE_REPOSITORY_URL, and TWINE_USERNAME for the PyPI upload.
